content.hero-statement: 7+ years at the intersection of environmental science and industrial compliance — driven by curiosity, precision, and a genuine love for the work.
content.about-lead: Soyeon Koo is a Senior Environmental Analyst with over seven years of experience in air quality monitoring and pollutant analysis.
content.about-body: Specializing in industrial emissions and ambient air assessment, she applies rigorous analytical methodologies to deliver data that withstands regulatory scrutiny. Her work spans the full measurement lifecycle — from instrument calibration and sample collection through laboratory analysis, quality assurance, and compliance reporting.
content.exp-d-1: Industrial stack emissions and ambient air assessment across regulated and unregulated pollutant classes.
content.exp-d-2: Quantitative detection of aldehydes, phenols, hydrogen chloride, and volatile organic compounds.
content.exp-d-3: Trace-level identification of metals and volatile compounds using validated laboratory instrumentation.
content.exp-d-4: Data integrity assurance, QA/QC protocols, and compliance reporting to environmental regulatory standards.
content.mth-f-1: ICP-OES — Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectroscopy
content.mth-d-1: Multi-element trace metal analysis in aqueous and digested environmental matrices.
content.mth-d-2: Separation and quantification of volatile and semi-volatile organic compounds.
content.mth-d-3: Single-element determination of metals at trace and ultra-trace concentrations.
content.mth-d-4: Definitive identification and quantification of complex organic mixtures and unknowns.
content.con-lead: Available for professional opportunities and collaboration.
content.con-sub: Reach out via LinkedIn to discuss projects or just to say hi!
content.pro-lead: Over seven years spent at the boundary of science and industrial accountability.
content.pro-body-1: Soyeon Koo has built her career around the precise measurement of what cannot be seen. Working across industrial sites and ambient monitoring networks, she applies validated analytical methods to characterize pollutant concentrations, trace emission sources, and verify compliance with environmental standards.
content.pro-body-2: Her expertise spans the detection of aldehydes, phenols, hydrogen chloride, volatile organic compounds, and trace metals — pollutant classes that demand both methodological rigor and careful interpretation. She operates instrumentation including ICP, GC, AA, and GC-MS systems, and maintains a consistent focus on data integrity throughout the analytical process.
content.p-baseball-body: An avid lover of the baseball team, LG Twins, Soyeon attends and follows every game whenever the schedule allows. She believes she was born to be their follower.
content.p-travel-body: Seeing the world helps Soyeon to see herself better. Discovering new cultures and landscapes around the world is not just travel: it's an exploration to her.
